seo.title: Rosemary, tomato and feta bake - something different - Marinda Kook

html:
I make this quick dish regularly alongside fish or meat. It's tasty and low effort. There are no measurements here . You work off your instinct. It's delicious.

 

YOU'LL NEED;

  • tomatoes that you slice thickly
  • feta cheese that you slice thickly – I slice each round through once
  • sprigs of rosemary
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • olive oil
  • balsamic vinegar

NOW:

  1. in a flat dish, layer the tomato and feta – salt and pepper the tomato
  2. drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar
  3. lay a few sprigs of fresh rosemary on top
  4. bake for about 20 minutes at 180 degrees celsius

The dish has a lovely fresh taste and is a winner. It looks beautiful and tastes delicious.
